issues.title: Investigate depdency on Boot in a few projects
issues.body:
Search for this dependency

```
		<!-- NOTE: Required only by the @ConstructorBinding. -->
		<dependency>
			<groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
			<artifactId>spring-boot</artifactId>
		</dependency>
```

We should find a workaround for the use of @ConstructorBinding so that there isn't a direct dependency on boot in the ai model provider's pom.

issues.title: Reopening bug in M3 - ChatResponse Metadata is overwritten by advisors
issues.body:
Reopening the issue reported in [1309](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/1309)
The issue is still not resolved.
I tried with M3 and ChatResponseMetadata still has EmptyUsage and EmptyRateLimit objects

comments.body:
@chetan-galgali can you share the model you are using with? Also you streaming or call? 
Actually can you share a code that reproduce the issue please.

Thank you @chetan-galgali , 
can you confirm that for the same request, if you comment out the advisors you receive non-empty usage? 
Have you tried to turn only only the QuestionAnswerAdvisor or the SimpleLoggerAdvisor advisors?

Hey @tzolov 
Below are the results:

1. No advisors - works fine
2. Only SimpleLoggerAdvisor - works fine
3. Only QuestionAnswerAdvisor - returns empty object
4. Both together - returns empty object

Seems like the issue might be in QuestionAnswerAdvisor

Let me know if you need any additional info
Thank you @tzolov . Is there any workaround I can use? I really need this feature to be working. And I cannot wait until M4

issues.title: Add Ollama embedding usage metadata
issues.body: Current `OllamaApi` and the related `OllamaEmbeddingModel` do not use the [Ollama Embedding](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#generate-embeddings) metadata response fields such as: total_duration, load_duration and prompt_eval_count. Later can be used to compute the embedding usage metrics
